title: claytonia caroliniana var. flava
intro: Claytonia caroliniana var. flava, also known as the yellow spring beauty, is a plant species belonging to the Portulacaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Claytonia caroliniana var. flava include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve blood lipid profiles, and provide antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a raw green, used in teas, or processed into capsules, highlighting its versatility as a medicinal plant.
